name: sub_DA31
notes: use-key/open-door: E86F consumes a key (C=1 if none -> $8F=6,CLC,RTS). Else reads door type via ($77),Y (Y=$0A), sets OAM $04A0-$04A2 and $8F=$1F, refreshes sprites (C2B1/C1D8 with $85=0), plays door song $0E (song_init), waits ~120 frames (C135, $36 NMI spin left 0 by sync_clear), restores $8E/$85 song, SEC/RTS. Callees C7FE/CAA5/C569 (via C135) frame-sync on $28 -> sync_clear ['28','36']. $77/$78 pinned to $0240 so the ($77),Y door read hits safe RAM, not the oracle's stack page.
